It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (å)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|qq=|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

(As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.

(As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.

(As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

(As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

(As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

(As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

(As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}
