===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å ­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

===Events=== * {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by [[:en:Kaibara Ekken|Kaihara Ekken]] in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term [[:en:Three Views of Japan|Japanâs Three Views]]. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪå ļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)
==Months of Yin Earth Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Snake== The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ=== * For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}. * {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} * {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

'''Yin Earth Snake also known as å·ąå·ģ''' (tsuchinotomi, kidonomi, kishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} ==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Snake|kanji=å·ąå·ģ|romaji=tsuchinoto mi|onyomi=ki shi|p=jĮsÃŽ|w=chi-ssu|mi=tÍĄÉiÂģâĩ sÉĻÂēÂđ|y=gei2 si6|j=gei2 si6|ci=kei siËÂē|mc=kÉĻj si|oc-bs=kÉŊĘ slÉŊĘ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Snake also known as å·ąå·ģ''' (tsuchinotomi, kidonomi, kishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} ==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

'''Yin Earth Snake also known as å·ąå·ģ''' (tsuchinotomi, kidonomi, kishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪåļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)

==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Snake==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows.
==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ===
* For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}.
* {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}
* {{ill|Great Bright Day|ja|åĪ§ææĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Bright Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=rekichuugedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

'''Yin Earth Snake also known as å·ąå·ģ''' (tsuchinotomi, kidonomi, kishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. ===Events===
* {{ill|Kishii Kikou|ja|å·ąå·ģįīčĄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii Kikou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: a travelogue of the western regions compiled by {{ill|Kaibara Ekken|en|Kaibara Ekken|WD=Q1721396|lt=Kaihara Ekken}} in {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 2 (1689 AD), notable for being the first known instance of the term {{ill|Three Views of Japan|en|Three Views of Japan|WD=Q1144867|lt=Japanâs Three Views}}. (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪåļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)

==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Snake==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows.
==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}===

'''Yin Earth Snake also known as å·ąå·ģ''' (tsuchinotomi, kidonomi, kishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 6th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|å­ååđēæŊ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to åđēæŊ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Boshin|ja|æčū°|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|åšå|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|é°é―äščĄææģ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪåļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)

==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly (As annotated in ãæ°æĨæŽåĪåļæå­ĶåĪ§įģŧã by {{ill|Itasaka Youko|ja|æŋåčå­|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasaka Youko|1=YÅko Itasaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11532544}}, Iwanami Shoten, 1991)

==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Snake==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|éļæĨ|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is as follows.
==={{nihongo|selection days|éļæĨ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The day of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|įŊå|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=å°å|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
===æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ===
* For {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} months of April, June, or October, it is an {{ill|Unlucky Assembly Day|ja|åķäžæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unlucky Assembly Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=RekichÅŦ Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}.
* {{ill|Divine Auspicious Day|ja|įĨåæĨ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Auspicious Day|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to æĶæģĻäļæŪĩ|1=RekichÅŦ Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}}

==Months of Yin Earth Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|lt=Kinoe (įē)|2=ja|3=įē|4=zh|5=įē|1=Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (įē)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|lt=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|2=ja|3=å·ą|4=zh|5=å·ą|1=Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (å·ą)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kishii|ja|1=Yin Earth Snake|å·ąå·ģ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishii|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Snake|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|æ§æĶ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.
